# LOVIX

> LOVIX is an AI-powered creative platform for generating videos, images, motion animations, and virtual AI influencers. Designed for content creators, marketers, social media managers, and brands.

## What LOVIX Does

LOVIX provides four core AI creative tools accessible via a credit-based subscription:

- **Lovix Video** — Generate AI videos from text prompts or reference images. Supports 4s, 8s, 12s durations; 1:1, 16:9, 9:16 aspect ratios; HD and 4K quality.
- **Lovix Image** — Generate and edit photorealistic AI images. Supports image editing with reference photos, style transfer, and upscaling.
- **Lovix Motion** — Transfer motion from reference videos to characters, apply lip sync with audio, and animate still images.
- **AI Influencer** — Create virtual AI influencer personas and generate branded content with consistent appearance across poses and video.

## Who Uses LOVIX

- Social media content creators producing short-form video for Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts
- Marketing agencies creating branded AI video ads
- E-commerce brands generating product visuals and promotional videos
- Developers integrating AI video/image generation via API

## Pricing

LOVIX uses a credit-based subscription model. All plans include Video, Image, Motion, and AI Influencer tools.

| Plan | Credits/mo | Price/mo |
|------|-----------|---------|
| Standard | 660 | $8.99 |
| Pro | 3,000 | $31.99 |
| Premier | 8,000 | $79.99 |
| Ultra | 26,000 | $154.99 |

Credit costs per generation:
- Video 4s HD: 150 credits
- Video 8s HD: 300 credits
- Video 12s HD: 450 credits
- Video 4K: +50% credits
- Image generation: 10 credits
- Motion transfer (standard): 200 credits
- Motion transfer (pro): 250 credits

Full pricing: https://lovix.app/pricing
Machine-readable pricing: https://lovix.app/pricing.md

- Homepage: https://lovix.app/

## Technical

- Platform: Web (browser-based, no install required)
- API: Available on Premier and Ultra plans
- Auth: Email/password and OAuth
- Output formats: MP4 (video), PNG/JPG (images)
- Max video resolution: 4K

## Company

LOVIX is an independent AI SaaS platform. Contact: lovixapp@gmail.com
Website: https://lovix.app
